title: Decisions
description: Inspired by "The Stanley Parable". A map with many decisions to make, all leading to different endings.
body:
WARNING! There are some bright lights in this map that appear. If you are prone to seizures/epilepsy then please don't play this map.

The purpose of this pack is to show a fun map I made with a varitey of different mods. This map has over 20 different endings to get and many things to see including over 30 different mods. Multiplayer is not suggested, however you will probably need the essentials mod in order to play with friends. This map is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and a Hypixle housing server created by a player named "ReeledPoet10038". Go Check both of those out as well as all of the amazing mods used in this map.

Instructions on how to play the map: Open the Modrinth app or website. Go into versions, click the only version and download BOTH things there (Decisions a Minecraft map and Decisions World Zip File). Once you've downloaded both of those, drag the Zip file into your "Saves" folder. Double click the Decisions world zip file and take whats inside. Then place it into your "Saves" folder. You can find your version's save folder by clicking on the folder button in the Modrinth modpack. Keep in mind you will need to at least create one random world for the "Saves" folder to appear.

In-game rules:
#1 Don't push buttons twice (It may reapeat things)
#2 Don't step on pressure plates twice (It may break the map)
#3 Don't try to break blocks (Just in case)
#4 Stay in Adventure mode, peaceful, render distance 12+
#5 If you somehow play with friends, go in the same direction
#6 Turn music all the way down, turn general sounds up to your preference and turn juteboxes up
#7 Look at chat. You will need it to make sense
#8 Playing in fullscreen is suggested

[DO NOT UPDATE ANY OF THE MODS IN THE MODRINTH MODPACK. IT WILL BREAK THE GAME!!!!!]

The mods that have been used in this pack are:
1. Architectury API, by architectury
2. Better Ladders, by meeetj
3. Better Runtime Resource Pack (BRRP), by SolidBlock
4. Blackwolf Library, by BlackWolf00
5. BlocksExpansion, by k3nder
6. Blockus, by Brandcraft
7. Bookshelf, by Darkhax
8. Bouncy Blocks, by LetoTheWolf
9. Cloth Config API, by shedaniel
10. Colored Lamps, by DunneWorteI
11. Dark Paintings, by Darkhax
12. Decorative Blocks, by lilypuree
13. Enchanted Vertical Slabs, by enchanted-games
14. Fabric API, by modmuss50
15. Factory Blocks, by Slainlight
16. Glassified, by Bobby_
17. Iron Ladders, by nNined
18. Laser Bridges & Doors, by MarsThePlanet
19. Macaw's Doors, by sketchmacaw
20. Macaw's Furniture, by sketchmacaw
21. Macaw's Paintings, by sketchmacaw
22. More Beautiful Buttons, by kreezxil
23. More Beautiful Plates, by kreezxil
24. More Beautiful Slabs, by BlackWolf00
25. More Doors, by afraidmonster
26. More Layered Blocks, by warior456
27. More Slabs And Stairs, by Crossover661
28. More Totems of Undying, by HyperPigeon
39. MoreFlowerPots (Fabric), by PheonixVX
30. NiceMod - New blocks, by MIUNO
31. Paladin's Furniture Mod, by unlikepaladin
32. Sign Copy, by TerminalMC
33. Sign Edit Lite, by pinter.gabor
34. Signed Paintings, by Nettakrim
35. Thaumon,by moonst0ne
